forexDescription: Trade 60+ currency pairs with spreads from 0.0 pips. Access the world's largest and most liquid market with institutional-grade execution.
metalsDescription: Trade gold, silver, platinum, and palladium with ultra-competitive spreads and deep liquidity. The ultimate safe-haven assets.
commoditiesDescription: Trade crude oil, natural gas, and soft commodities with tight spreads and 24/5 market access. Diversify your portfolio with essential resources.
indicesDescription: Trade world indices including US30, S&P 500, NASDAQ, and more. Get exposure to entire economies with a single position.
cryptoDescription: Trade Bitcoin, Ethereum, and 30+ top cryptocurrencies with leveraged CFDs. 24/7 market access with deep liquidity.
sharesDescription: Trade shares of top global companies including Apple, Google, Amazon, and Tesla. Get fractional shares exposure with leverage.
allMarketsDesc: Diversify your portfolio with 200+ trading instruments across all major asset classes.
